message:
feat(sql): add MethodExtractor for @logic_table inlining

Add logic_table_compiler.zig with MethodExtractor that:
- Extracts method bodies from metal0-generated Zig code
- Parses method signatures (params, return types)
- Transforms param references to column array access (x -> columns.x[i])
- Cleans up runtime.xxx calls (runtime.addNum -> +, etc.)

This is the core extraction logic for the fused query compilation
pipeline. The actual Python->Zig compilation happens in metal0_jit.zig.
